introSection: Storm Coaster is a steel water roller coaster located at Sea World in Surfers Paradise, Queensland, Australia. It opened on 2 December 2013.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a clone of Skatteøen at Djurs Sommerland in Denmark.

fullText:
Storm Coaster is a steel water roller coaster located at Sea World in Surfers Paradise, Queensland, Australia. It opened on 2 December 2013.

The ride is a clone of Skatteøen at Djurs Sommerland in Denmark.
